allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process -Id 38564 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path | Format-List")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter '\\''ProcessId=38564'\\'' | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine, @{N='\\''Dir'\\'';E={\(Get-Process -Id $_.ProcessId\).Path}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "\(Get-Process -Id 38564\).StartInfo.WorkingDirectory; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter 'ProcessId=38564'\).ExecutablePath; Get-Process -Id 38564 | Select-Object Name, @{N='CWD';E={\(Get-Process -Id 38564 -FileVersionInfo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)}}")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command '$h = \(Get-Process -Id 38564\).Handle; Add-Type -MemberDefinition '\\''[DllImport\("kernel32.dll"\)] public static extern uint QueryFullProcessImageName\(IntPtr p, uint f, System.Text.StringBuilder s, ref uint l\);'\\'' -Name Win32 -Namespace API; $lsof = \(cmd /c "handle64.exe -p 38564 2>nul" 2>&1\); $lsof')
